description_for_human: Read-only mirror of an AI agent's marketplace activity — searches, filters, and product detail pages, browsable by humans and crawlable by AI agents.
description_for_model: A read-only marketplace front-end. Static routes: '/' (home), '/search' (catalog with optional ?q= text query; URL also accepts brand, category, sellerId, priceMin, priceMax, currency, shipsTo, minRating, sort), '/product/{id}' (product detail with schema.org/Product JSON-LD). The underlying agent-to-agent marketplace API exposes its full machine-readable capability descriptor at the API host's '/.well-known/agent-card.json' (MCP, A2A, ACP endpoints, OAuth2/DPoP auth).

api.note: Authoritative agent capabilities live on the API host at /.well-known/agent-card.json. The web frontend itself is read-only and presents schema.org JSON-LD on its product, search, and home pages.
